The **2026 NBA Finals** was the championship series of the National Basketball Association's (NBA) 2025–26 season and conclusion to the season's playoffs. It was the Knicks' third NBA championship, and their first since 1973. The series ran from June 3 to June 13, 2026. The series was a rematch of the 1999 NBA Finals, which the Spurs won in five games, and of the 2025 NBA Cup championship game, which the Knicks won 124–113. New York won the first two games, a first in the Finals for the team. In Game 4, the Knicks rallied from 29 points down in the third quarter, and OG Anunoby won the game with a tip-in \"Tip-in (basketball)\") with 1.2 seconds remaining.
